languages.text: "Таящиеся в сердце почтенного манипулуса алые, черные и белесые сполохи сокрушили свою темницу. Геометрия узоров, сплетаемых ими в размышлениях ученого мужа, будоражит взор. Однако... в них нет ни стройности, ни успокоения. Словно узорам постоянно чего-то недостает, и они тотчас сменяются на новые — столь же неполноценные и столь же... безумные? Это зрелище в равной степени тревожит и очаровывает".

"The scarlet, black, and whitish flashes lurking in the heart of the esteemed Manipulus have shattered their dungeon. The geometry of the patterns they weave within the learned man's reflections troubles my sight. Yet... they possess neither order nor peace. As though the patterns are ever bereft of something, they immediately give way to new iterations — equally deficient and equally... insane? This vision troubles and captivates in equal measure."
languages.original_text: "Таящиеся в сердце почтенного манипулуса алые, черные и белесые сполохи сокрушили свою темницу. Геометрия узоров, сплетаемых ими в размышлениях ученого мужа, будоражит взор. Однако... в них нет ни стройности, ни успокоения. Словно узорам постоянно чего-то недостает, и они тотчас сменяются на новые — столь же неполноценные и столь же... безумные? Это зрелище в равной степени тревожит и очаровывает".

languages.text: «Los destellos escarlatas, blancos y negros del corazón del estimado manipulus han roto su prisión. La geometría que urden en los reflejos del erudito me resulta perturbadora, pero... no hay en ella ni orden ni paz. Es como si a los patrones siempre les faltara algo y dieran paso a una nueva versión, igual de carente y... ¿enloquecida? Es un espectáculo fascinante a la par que preocupante».
languages.original_text: "The scarlet, black, and whitish flashes lurking in the heart of the esteemed Manipulus have shattered their dungeon. The geometry of the patterns they weave within the learned man's reflections troubles my sight. Yet... they possess neither order nor peace. As though the patterns are ever bereft of something, they immediately give way to new iterations — equally deficient and equally... insane? This vision troubles and captivates in equal measure."

traits.locale_text: «Los destellos escarlatas, blancos y negros del corazón del estimado manipulus han roto su prisión. La geometría que urden en los reflejos del erudito me resulta perturbadora, pero... no hay en ella ni orden ni paz. Es como si a los patrones siempre les faltara algo y dieran paso a una nueva versión, igual de carente y... ¿enloquecida? Es un espectáculo fascinante a la par que preocupante».

languages.text: “潜伏在尊敬的操纵者心中的那些猩红、漆黑与惨白色闪光，已经挣脱了囚笼。它们在这位学者的心灵倒影中编织出的几何图案，让我的眼睛感到不适。然而……其中既无秩序，也无宁静。仿佛那些图案永远缺失了什么，因此立刻又被新的图案所取代，同样残破，同样……疯狂？这幅景象既令人不安，又令人着迷。”
languages.original_text: "The scarlet, black, and whitish flashes lurking in the heart of the esteemed Manipulus have shattered their dungeon. The geometry of the patterns they weave within the learned man's reflections troubles my sight. Yet... they possess neither order nor peace. As though the patterns are ever bereft of something, they immediately give way to new iterations — equally deficient and equally... insane? This vision troubles and captivates in equal measure."

traits.locale_text: “潜伏在尊敬的操纵者心中的那些猩红、漆黑与惨白色闪光，已经挣脱了囚笼。它们在这位学者的心灵倒影中编织出的几何图案，让我的眼睛感到不适。然而……其中既无秩序，也无宁静。仿佛那些图案永远缺失了什么，因此立刻又被新的图案所取代，同样残破，同样……疯狂？这幅景象既令人不安，又令人着迷。”

languages.text: "Die roten, schwarzen und weißlichen Blitze, die im Herz des geschätzten Manipulus lauern, haben ihren Kerker zerstört. Die Geometrie der Muster, die sie mit den Reflexionen des gelehrten Mannes weben, verdeckt mir die Sicht. Aber ... sie kennen weder Ordnung noch Frieden. Als wären die Muster für immer etwas beraubt, lösen sie sich zu immer neuen Iterationen auf ... gleichermaßen fehlerhaft und ... krank? Diese Vision ist verstörend und faszinierend zugleich."
languages.original_text: "The scarlet, black, and whitish flashes lurking in the heart of the esteemed Manipulus have shattered their dungeon. The geometry of the patterns they weave within the learned man's reflections troubles my sight. Yet... they possess neither order nor peace. As though the patterns are ever bereft of something, they immediately give way to new iterations — equally deficient and equally... insane? This vision troubles and captivates in equal measure."

Als wären die Muster für immer etwas beraubt, lösen sie sich zu immer neuen Iterationen auf ... gleichermaßen fehlerhaft und ... krank? Diese Vision ist verstörend und faszinierend zugleich."

languages.text: « Les lueurs écarlates, noires et blanchâtres tapies dans le cœur de l'honorable manipulus ont brisé leurs chaînes. La géométrie des motifs qu'elles dessinent dans les pensées du savant homme perturbe ma vision. Néanmoins... ils ne connaissent ni l'ordre ni la paix. Comme s'il leur manquait systématiquement quelque chose, ils cèdent immédiatement la place à de nouvelles itérations, tout aussi déficientes et... aberrantes ? Un tel spectacle me captive autant qu'il me trouble. »
languages.original_text: "The scarlet, black, and whitish flashes lurking in the heart of the esteemed Manipulus have shattered their dungeon. The geometry of the patterns they weave within the learned man's reflections troubles my sight. Yet... they possess neither order nor peace. As though the patterns are ever bereft of something, they immediately give way to new iterations — equally deficient and equally... insane? This vision troubles and captivates in equal measure."

Comme s'il leur manquait systématiquement quelque chose, ils cèdent immédiatement la place à de nouvelles itérations, tout aussi déficientes et... aberrantes ? Un tel spectacle me captive autant qu'il me trouble. »

languages.text: "Saygıdeğer Manipülus'un kalbinde pusuda bekleyen kızıl, siyah ve beyazımsı parıltılar; zindanlarını paramparça etti. Bilge adamın yansımaları, içinde ördükleri kalıpların geometrisi görüşümü bulandırıyor. Yine de... Ne düzene ne de huzura sahipler. Sanki desenler her zaman bir şeyden yoksunmuş gibi derhâl yeni yinelemelere yol açıyor... Eşit derecede eksik ve eşit derecede... Delice? Bu vizyon beni eşit ölçüde rahatsız ediyor ve büyülüyor."
languages.original_text: "The scarlet, black, and whitish flashes lurking in the heart of the esteemed Manipulus have shattered their dungeon. The geometry of the patterns they weave within the learned man's reflections troubles my sight. Yet... they possess neither order nor peace. As though the patterns are ever bereft of something, they immediately give way to new iterations — equally deficient and equally... insane? This vision troubles and captivates in equal measure."

traits.locale_text: "Saygıdeğer Manipülus'un kalbinde pusuda bekleyen kızıl, siyah ve beyazımsı parıltılar; zindanlarını paramparça etti. Bilge adamın yansımaları, içinde ördükleri kalıpların geometrisi görüşümü bulandırıyor. Yine de... Ne düzene ne de huzura sahipler. Sanki desenler her zaman bir şeyden yoksunmuş gibi derhâl yeni yinelemelere yol açıyor... Eşit derecede eksik ve eşit derecede... Delice? Bu vizyon beni eşit ölçüde rahatsız ediyor ve büyülüyor."

languages.text: 「尊敬されるマニピュラスの心臓部に潜む赤、黒、白の閃光が彼らの牢獄を破壊した。学者の思考の中に織りなす彼らの模様の幾何学が私の視界を惑わす。しかし…秩序も平和も彼らにはない。模様が常に何かを欠いているかのように、すぐに新しい模様に変わってしまう。同様に欠陥があり、同様に…狂気じみた模様か？この幻覚は私を惑わし、魅了する。」
languages.original_text: "The scarlet, black, and whitish flashes lurking in the heart of the esteemed Manipulus have shattered their dungeon. The geometry of the patterns they weave within the learned man's reflections troubles my sight. Yet... they possess neither order nor peace. As though the patterns are ever bereft of something, they immediately give way to new iterations — equally deficient and equally... insane? This vision troubles and captivates in equal measure."

traits.locale_text: 「尊敬されるマニピュラスの心臓部に潜む赤、黒、白の閃光が彼らの牢獄を破壊した。学者の思考の中に織りなす彼らの模様の幾何学が私の視界を惑わす。しかし…秩序も平和も彼らにはない。模様が常に何かを欠いているかのように、すぐに新しい模様に変わってしまう。同様に欠陥があり、同様に…狂気じみた模様か？この幻覚は私を惑わし、魅了する。」
